function: () => { const logs = []; const origLog = console.log; const origWarn = console.warn; console.log = (...a) => { logs.push(['log', ...a].join(' ')); origLog(...a); }; console.warn = (...a) => { logs.push(['warn', ...a].join(' ')); origWarn(...a); }; window.__captureLogs = logs; setTimeout(() => { console.log = origLog; console.warn = origWarn; }, 4000); return 'capture started'; }
